designSystem.name: Learny
designSystem.description: A playful, bold language-learning app design system. Combines high-energy typography with a warm neutral base, cartoon-style illustration elements, and punchy red accents. Tone is friendly, energetic, and accessible — like a children's book meets a modern SaaS landing page.

aestheticProfile.tone: Energetic, approachable, child-friendly but not babyish
influences: Flat design with soft rounded shapes
keyDesignPrinciples: Large, expressive display type as a hero element
Soft warm backgrounds with white card surfaces
One dominant accent color used boldly and sparingly
Rounded corners throughout all UI elements
Flat color illustration with no gradients
Generous whitespace with deliberate density in hero sections

display.name: Vina Sans
display.characteristics: Condensed, ultra-bold, all-caps capable, very high visual impact
display.usage: Hero headings, section titles, large decorative text

body.name: System sans-serif (clean, geometric)
body.characteristics: Clean, readable, low visual weight to contrast the display font
body.usage: Body copy, nav links, card text, CTA labels, UI elements

dark.usage: Primary text, logo background pill, dark CTAs, card text

accent.usage: Hero headlines, primary CTA buttons, active states, bold highlights

background.usage: Page and section background — warm off-white/sage tint

surface.usage: Cards, modals, floating elements, nav background

white.usage: Speech bubbles, inner card fills, button text

colorUsageRules: Accent (#f43651) is ONLY used for display headings, key CTAs, and critical highlights — never for body text
Background (#e7e7d8) always feels warm, never pure white or pure grey
Cards float on the background using #f2f2f2 with no border — separation is purely tonal
Dark (#161616) is the anchor; black buttons are preferred over colored ones in secondary contexts
The only exception to the palette is the app-download banner section which uses a vibrant blue (#3b82f6) to create a strong visual break

navbar.description: Minimal nav, horizontally centered links, logo pill on left, CTA on right
navbar.layout: flex, space-between, with centered nav links

logo.style: Word mark in a rounded pill shape

heroSection.description: Full-bleed section with enormous stacked display type on the left, a central mascot illustration, and a speech bubble to the right
heroSection.layout: Overlapping layers — text left, illustration center-bottom, speech bubble top-right
heroSection.headingStyle: Multi-line stacked uppercase display font in accent color, massive scale, line-height ~0.9

speechBubble.shape: Cloud or thought bubble with irregular bumps at the base
speechBubble.placement: Top-right quadrant, overlapping the mascot illustration

decorativeElements.style: Flat filled, muted grey (#aaaaaa to #cccccc), scattered asymmetrically

languagePickerSection.description: Section showing popular languages as circular flag indicators in a floating pill, with scattered vocabulary cards below
languagePickerSection.sectionLabel: Small uppercase label above the heading (e.g. '100+ languages')
languagePickerSection.heading: sectionHeading style — all caps, bold, dark color

flagPicker.style: Horizontal pill container with circular flag icons

vocabularyCards.layout: Staggered horizontal row, 4 cards, slightly offset vertically
vocabularyCards.background: Soft pastel variants: light blue, light pink, light purple, light peach

label.style: Floating white pill above or on the card

vocabularyCards.illustration: Flat object icon, centered, no outline shadow

benefitsSection.description: 3-column card grid showing app benefits with icon, title, body, and learn more CTA
benefitsSection.sectionHeading: Centered, display font, accent color or dark
benefitsSection.cardLayout: 3-column grid, equal width, generous internal padding

iconContainer.iconColor: Matching mid-saturation tone of the container tint

cta.label: Learn more
cta.style: Full-width dark rounded button at card bottom

ctaBannerSection.description: Full-bleed app download section with bold headline, CTA, and device mockup cluster
ctaBannerSection.background: #3b82f6 (vivid blue — intentional palette break for energy)

cloudDecoration.style: Large white cloud blob shape behind device frames

deviceMockups.layout: Overlapping, center phone is larger/front, side phones slightly smaller and angled

illustration.style: Flat vector cartoon — no gradients, bold outlines on character figures, simplified geometry for objects

characterDesign.clothing: Dark dungarees/overalls over a pink shirt
characterDesign.expression: Simple and friendly — dot eyes, small upward mouth
characterDesign.outlineWeight: 2–3px solid dark stroke on character edges

objectIllustrations.style: Flat, single-tone objects with no gradients

decorativeShapes.usage: Scattered asymmetrically around mascot in hero, adds rhythm and movement

writingStyle.heroHeading: Imperative verb phrase OR emotional benefit — ALL CAPS display font, split across 2–3 lines
writingStyle.sectionHeading: Short declarative benefit statement in ALL CAPS
writingStyle.ctaText: Action-first short verbs: 'Get Started', 'Learn More', 'Download Now'
writingStyle.cardBody: Concise 2–3 sentences. Warm, second-person. Focus on benefit not feature.

cssVariables._comment: Paste inside :root {} in your global stylesheet
